check.ask: The clone in .extern/{org-repo}/ is disposable; the research is already persisted. Remove the clone now? - Keep (Recommended): leave it for further study this session - Remove: rm -rf the clone directory

check.action: Leave the clone in .extern/. Autonomous cleanup is never automatic — deleting without confirmation is destructive, and a later step in the calling workflow may want the clone. The workspace is gitignored and disposable; an explicit cleanup or the next session removes it.
